name: Dropbox
description: Sync Dropbox files and folders into the Shielva knowledge base via the Dropbox API v2.

install_fields.label: App Key
install_fields.help: Dropbox App Key from the Dropbox App Console (https://www.dropbox.com/developers/apps).

install_fields.label: App Secret
install_fields.help: Dropbox App Secret from the Dropbox App Console.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI (optional)
install_fields.help: OAuth2 redirect URI. Must match a URI registered in the Dropbox App Console.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate app_key/app_secret and optionally verify access_token via POST /users/get_current_account.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return the Dropbox OAuth2 authorization URL for the user to grant access.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: POST /users/get_current_account and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with display name and email.

methods.name: Sync Files
methods.description: Recursively list all Dropbox files and folders and sync into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Folder
methods.description: List contents of a Dropbox folder.

methods.name: List Folder (Continue)
methods.description: Continue a folder listing using a cursor.

methods.name: Get Metadata
methods.description: Retrieve metadata for a file or folder by path.

methods.name: List Shared Links
methods.description: List shared links for a given path or the entire account.

methods.name: Get Space Usage
methods.description: Return allocation and used bytes for the account.

methods.name: List Team Members
methods.description: List members of the team (team apps only).
